title: Gavilea kingii
taxonomy: Gavilea kingii is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, Orchidaceae. It is native to New Zealand. The classification of Gavilea kingii is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Genus: Gavilea, Species: G. kingii. Gavilea kingii is a member of the Gavilea genus, which is a group of orchids that are endemic to New Zealand. The classification of this plant highlights its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
